# Coffee Makes Games

> Coffee Makes Games is a one-person indie studio that designs and publishes mobile games for the App Store.

The studio's catalog includes Dungeon Story, SIGNAL//LOSS, Mini Boba Shop, and Turbo Truck Drive.

## Home

- [Home](https://coffeemakesgames.com): Overview of the studio and its games.

## Dungeon Story

- [Press](https://coffeemakesgames.com/dungeon-story/press): Press information for Dungeon Story.
- [Privacy Policy](https://coffeemakesgames.com/dungeon-story/privacy): Privacy policy for Dungeon Story.

## SIGNAL//LOSS

- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/signal-loss/id6781405491): Download SIGNAL//LOSS.
- [Press](https://coffeemakesgames.com/signal-loss/press): Press information for SIGNAL//LOSS.
- [Privacy Policy](https://coffeemakesgames.com/signal-loss/privacy): Privacy policy for SIGNAL//LOSS.

## Mini Boba Shop

- [Privacy Policy](https://coffeemakesgames.com/mini-boba-shop/privacy): Privacy policy for Mini Boba Shop.

## Turbo Truck Drive

- [Privacy Policy](https://coffeemakesgames.com/turbo-truck-drive/privacy): Privacy policy for Turbo Truck Drive.

## Site Metadata

- [Sitemap](https://coffeemakesgames.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap of the site.
